theme_notes: Drawn from Trump holding off an Iran airstrike for 'serious negotiations,' today's six-state midterm primaries testing Trump's grip on the GOP, Elon Musk losing his OpenAI lawsuit (jury: he waited too long), Stephen Colbert's Late Show getting cancelled by CBS (final show May 21), and the PSG vs Arsenal Champions League final looming in Budapest on May 30.
settled: Even Trump blinked on Iran. Respect the peace.
Colbert's show ends May 21. Your debt ends today. Better timing.
Musk's lawsuit got tossed in hours. Some things actually resolve.
youOwe: Less than Musk's filing fee. He also got nothing.
You're in 'serious negotiations' territory. That is not a compliment.
Even Havana's power bill rounds to more than this. Barely.
Trump delayed an Iran airstrike with less hesitation than your Venmo.
Six states voted today. Your debt ran unopposed in all of them.
Musk waited too long and lost the whole case. Familiar energy.
That's a flight to Budapest for PSG vs Arsenal. You chose this instead.
CBS cancelled The Late Show. Your excuses are also getting cancelled.
Cuba's had diesel reserves this size. Past tense.
Trump held off an Iran strike for less pressure than this. Think about that.
A drone hit a UAE nuclear facility yesterday. You hit a new floor today.
Six states decided their futures today. Yours remains under review.
You have cleared diplomacy. You are now in sanctions territory.
Musk sued, waited years, and got nothing. You're speedrunning that.
Iran is at the negotiating table. You're still in the parking lot.
This isn't a debt. It's a foreign policy incident.
Even Colbert couldn't write a closer for this number.
The US considered an Iran airstrike. They're now considering worse for you.
theyOwe: A rounding error. Even Iran rounds up.
Musk appealed a lost lawsuit faster than they've sent a receipt.
Smaller than Qatar's drone insurance deductible. Still counts.
They're stalling. This is the 'serious negotiations' phase. It ends badly.
Six states voted today. Zero elected to pay you back.
Colbert's been more upfront about cancellation than they've been about this.
That's Champions League final ticket money. They clearly had it.
They owe you more than Cuba's seen in diesel since March.
The 'I'll get you back soon' era ended. This is an occupation now.
A drone hit a nuclear plant. They hit your trust. Both unprovoked.
Arsenal made the UCL final with less drama than collecting this.
Musk had lawyers and a press strategy. You have this notification.
You are Qatar: energy-rich, strategically vital, completely blockaded.
At this sum, 'we'll sort it out' is an act of aggression.
PSG knocked out Bayern 6-5 on aggregate. You've suffered longer than that.
This isn't a balance. It's a sanctions regime.
Iran's been at war for 11 weeks. This debt is older. Impressive.
Colbert's signing off after 11 years. You've been owed this for what feels like 20.
